topic.date_range_guidance: Prioritise 2015-2026. Use older authoritative multiplier/method sources only where still standard.
priority_venues: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management

database_search_strings.Scopus/WoS: (construction OR infrastructure OR "built asset") AND (job* OR employ* OR workforce OR FTE OR "job-years") AND (capex OR "economic impact" OR "jobs per million")
database_search_strings.Google Scholar: "jobs per million" construction capex OR "job-years" "economic impact"
database_search_strings.Australia grey lit: site:gov.au construction jobs economic impact capex PDF

topic.topic_title: Data-centre construction and operations jobs per million dollars capex
topic.research_goal: Targeted evidence search for source-backed metrics linking data-centre capital expenditure to construction jobs, construction job-years, peak workers, operational FTE, and local economic employment effects. Prioritise government evaluations, fiscal/economic-impact analyses, and project reports that report capex or construction spending together with job counts. Known leads to verify or expand: Minnesota high-tech data-centre tax exemption evaluation; Prince William County and Morrow County data-centre economic-impact studies; Pham 2017 typical facility; Yue & Zeng 2026; Food & Water Watch if source-verified. Normalise only when denominator is explicit. Separate direct, indirect/induced, peak, annual FTE, job-years, projected and realised. Do not use 10 jobs/MW as a data-centre coefficient. Deliver usable source table, rejected-source table, and verification queue.
topic.role_descriptor: expert construction economist and systematic evidence curator
subtopic_axes: data-centre construction jobs per US$1M or A$1M capex
data-centre operational FTE per million dollars investment
county and state fiscal/economic-impact analyses with construction spending denominators
equipment leakage and imported-server adjustments in local impact models
project-level capex with construction headcount and duration
direct versus total-supported jobs per dollar

search_batches.name: govt_evaluations
search_batches.description: Legislative, audit, and tax-exemption evaluations with jobs per construction output.

search_batches.name: county_impact
search_batches.description: County-level fiscal and economic-impact analyses (Prince William, Morrow, etc.).

search_batches.name: project_io
search_batches.description: Input-output and consultant reports with capex and job totals for named facilities.

search_batches.name: normalisation_methods
search_batches.description: Methods for transparent jobs-per-$M normalisation and scope boundaries.
